en: It shall come to pass in the latter days that the mountain of the house of the LORD shall be established as the highest of the mountains, and it shall be lifted up above the hills; and peoples shall flow to it,
zh: 到末後的日子， 耶和華殿的山， 必矗立在萬山之上， 高舉過於萬嶺； 萬民都要流歸這山。

en: and many nations shall come, and say: "Come, let us go up to the mountain of the LORD, to the house of the God of Jacob, that he may teach us his ways and that we may walk in his paths." For out of Zion shall go forth the law, and the word of the LORD from Jerusalem.
zh: 必有多國的人前來說： “來吧！我們上耶和華的山， 登雅各 神的殿； 他必把他的道路指示我們， 我們也要遵行他的道； 因為教訓必出於錫安。 耶和華的話要來自耶路撒冷。

en: He shall judge between many peoples, and shall decide for strong nations afar off; and they shall beat their swords into plowshares, and their spears into pruning hooks; nation shall not lift up sword against nation, neither shall they learn war anymore;
zh: “他要在多族中施行審判， 為遠方的強國斷定是非。 他們必把刀劍打成犁頭， 把矛槍打成鐮刀； 這國不舉刀攻擊那國， 他們也不再學習戰事。

en: but they shall sit every man under his vine and under his fig tree, and no one shall make them afraid, for the mouth of the LORD of hosts has spoken.
zh: 各人都要坐在自己的葡萄樹， 和無花果樹下， 無人驚嚇他們， 因為萬軍之耶和華親口說過了。

en: For all the peoples walk each in the name of its god, but we will walk in the name of the LORD our God forever and ever.
zh: 雖然，萬民各奉自己神的名行事， 我們卻要永遠奉耶和華我們 神的名而行。”

en: In that day, declares the LORD, I will assemble the lame and gather those who have been driven away and those whom I have afflicted;
zh: 耶和華說：“到那日， 我必召聚瘸腿的， 集合被趕散的， 和我所苦待的。

en: and the lame I will make the remnant, and those who were cast off, a strong nation; and the LORD will reign over them in Mount Zion from this time forth and forevermore.
zh: 我必使瘸腿的作餘民； 使被放逐的成為強國； 耶和華必在錫安山作王統治他們， 從現在直到永遠。

en: And you, O tower of the flock, hill of the daughter of Zion, to you shall it come, the former dominion shall come, kingship for the daughter of Jerusalem.
zh: 你這羊群的守望樓啊！ 錫安女子的俄斐勒啊！ 從前的權柄，必歸給你， 就是耶路撒冷女子的國權， 要歸還給你。

en: Now why do you cry aloud? Is there no king in you? Has your counselor perished, that pain seized you like a woman in labor?
zh: 現在你為甚麼大聲呼喊？ 難道你們中間沒有君王嗎？ 或是你的謀士滅亡了， 以致疼痛抓緊你，好像臨產的婦人呢？

en: Writhe and groan, O daughter of Zion, like a woman in labor, for now you shall go out from the city and dwell in the open country; you shall go to Babylon. There you shall be rescued; there the LORD will redeem you from the hand of your enemies.
zh: 錫安的女子啊！ 你要疼痛劬勞， 好像臨產的婦人； 因為現在你要從城裡出來， 住在田野， 一定要到巴比倫去； 在那裡你要蒙拯救， 在那裡耶和華必救贖你， 脫離仇敵的掌握。

en: Now many nations are assembled against you, saying, "Let her be defiled, and let our eyes gaze upon Zion."
zh: 現在多國的民集合起來， 攻擊你，說：‘願錫安被蹂躪， 願我們親眼看見錫安遭報應。’”

en: But they do not know the thoughts of the LORD; they do not understand his plan, that he has gathered them as sheaves to the threshing floor.
zh: 但是，他們卻不知道耶和華的意念， 也不明白他的謀略； 他收集他們，好像把禾捆收集到禾場一樣。

en: Arise and thresh, O daughter of Zion, for I will make your horn iron, and I will make your hoofs bronze; you shall beat in pieces many peoples; and shall devote their gain to the LORD, their wealth to the Lord of the whole earth.
zh: 錫安的女子啊！起來踹穀吧！ 因為我必使你的角成為鐵， 使你的蹄成為銅； 你必粉碎許多民族， 毀滅他們所得的不義之財，作為祭物獻與耶和華， 把他們的財寶獻給全地的主。
